description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a covered porch supported by wooden columns, with a set of steps leading up to the main entrance. Large windows are present on the front and side walls, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and porch canopy. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a paved surface and includes a single tree near one corner, adding greenery to the otherwise minimalist landscape. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat dark roof, light exterior walls, a covered porch, and large windows, set on a paved plot with a tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, large front window, and a tree to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the porch extending to the left, a large side window, and the tree positioned closer to the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal window openings and the tree visible on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing two grouped windows and the flat roof's extension, with the tree partially visible behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
